name: Two-Phase Commit
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TwoPhaseCommit ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES participants, votes, decision, messages, state
VoteYesMsg(p) == [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"]
VoteNoMsg(p) == [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"]
CommitMsg(p) == [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"]
AbortMsg(p) == [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"]

SendPrepare ==
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "none"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {PrepareMsg(p) : p \in participants}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<votes, decision, state>>

ReceiveVoteYes ==
  /\ \E p \in participants: [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"] \in messages
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "yes"]
  /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteYes"] }
  /\ UNCHANGED <<decision, state>>

ReceiveVoteNo ==
  /\ \E p \in participants: [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"] \in messages
  /\ votes' = [votes EXCEPT ![p] = "no"]
  /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> p, receiver |-> "coordinator", type |-> "VoteNo"] }
  /\ UNCHANGED <<decision, state>>

DecideCommit ==
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ \A p \in participants: votes[p] = "yes"
  /\ decision' = "commit"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, state, messages>>

DecideAbort ==
  /\ decision = "none"
  /\ \E p \in participants: votes[p] = "no"
  /\ decision' = "abort"
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, state, messages>>

SendCommit ==
  /\ decision = "commit"
  /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "none"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {CommitMsg(p) : p \in participants}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, decision, state>>

SendAbort ==
  /\ decision = "abort"
  /\ \A p \in participants: state[p] = "none"
  /\ messages' = messages \cup {AbortMsg(p) : p \in participants}
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, decision, state>>

ReceiveCommit ==
  /\ \E p \in participants: [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"] \in messages
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "committed"]
  /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Commit"] }
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, decision>>

ReceiveAbort ==
  /\ \E p \in participants: [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"] \in messages
  /\ state' = [state EXCEPT ![p] = "aborted"]
  /\ messages' = messages \ { [sender |-> "coordinator", receiver |-> p, type |-> "Abort"] }
  /\ UNCHANGED <<participants, votes, decision>>

Next ==
  \/ SendPrepare
  \/ ReceiveVoteYes
  \/ ReceiveVoteNo
  \/ DecideCommit
  \/ DecideAbort
  \/ SendCommit
  \/ SendAbort
  \/ ReceiveCommit
  \/ ReceiveAbort

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<participants, votes, decision, state, messages>>

name: Dining Philosophers
generated_spec:
---- MODULE DiningPhilosophers ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES forks, states

(* Constants *)
N == 5

(* Helper functions *)
LEFT(i) == IF i = 1 THEN N ELSE i - 1
RIGHT(i) == IF i = N THEN 1 ELSE i + 1

(* State predicates *)
ForkFree(i) == forks[i] = 0
ForkTaken(i, p) == forks[i] = p

PhilosopherThinking(i) == states[i] = "thinking"
PhilosopherHungry(i) == states[i] = "hungry"
PhilosopherEating(i) == states[i] = "eating"

(* Initial state *)
Init == /\ forks = [i \in 1..N |-> 0]
        /\ states = [i \in 1..N |-> "thinking"]

(* Next-state relation *)
Next == 
    \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "thinking"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
        /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "hungry"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = i, ![RIGHT(i)] = i]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i)
        /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "eating"]
        /\ forks' = forks
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "eating"
        /\ ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i)
        /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = [forks EXCEPT ![LEFT(i)] = 0, ![RIGHT(i)] = 0]
    \/ \E i \in 1..N : 
        /\ states[i] = "hungry"
        /\ ForkFree(LEFT(i))
        /\ ForkFree(RIGHT(i))
        /\ states' = [states EXCEPT ![i] = "thinking"]
        /\ forks' = forks

(* Specification *)
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<forks, states>>

(* Type invariant *)
TypeOK == /\ forks \in [1..N -> 0..N]
          /\ states \in [1..N -> {"thinking", "hungry", "eating"}]
          /\ \A i \in 1..N : 
                IF ForkTaken(i, p) THEN p \in 1..N

          /\ \A i \in 1..N : 
                IF states[i] = "hungry" THEN ForkTaken(LEFT(i), i) /\ ForkTaken(RIGHT(i), i)

Max(S) == CHOOSE x \in S : \A y \in S : x >= y

name: Raft Leader Election
generated_spec:
---- MODULE RaftLeaderElection ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES currentTerm, votedFor, state

Init == /\ currentTerm = 0
        /\ votedFor = NULL
        /\ state = "Follower"

Next == \/ /\ state = "Follower"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Follower"
        \/ /\ state = "Candidate"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm + 1
        /\ votedFor' = NULL
        /\ state' = "Candidate"
        \/ /\ state = "Leader"
        /\ currentTerm' = currentTerm
        /\ votedFor' = votedFor
        /\ state' = "Leader"

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<currentTerm, votedFor, state>>

name: Read-Write Lock
generated_spec:
---- MODULE ReadWriteLock ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES readers, writer_active

Init == /\ readers = <<>>
       /\ writer_active = FALSE

Next == \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Append(readers, 1)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = Tail(readers)
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE
      \/ /\ writer_active = FALSE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
          /\ writer_active' = TRUE
      \/ /\ writer_active = TRUE
          /\ readers' = <<>>
          /\ writer_active' = FALSE

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<readers, writer_active>>

name: Token Ring
generated_spec:
---- MODULE TokenRing ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANT N

VARIABLE token

Init == /\ token \in 1..N

Next == /\ token' \in 1..N
        /\ token' = IF token = N THEN 1 ELSE token + 1

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<token>>

name: Simple Key-Value Store
generated_spec:
---- MODULE KeyValueStore ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS Keys, Values

VARIABLES store

Init == /\ store \in [Keys -> Values]
Next == /\ store' \in [Keys -> Values]
      /\ \E k \in Keys : \E v \in Values : store' = [store EXCEPT ![k] = v]

Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<store>>

name: Paxos Single-Decree
generated_spec:
---- MODULE Paxos ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

VARIABLES acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots, values
Ballot == [p \in proposers |-> ballots[p]]
Value == [p \in proposers |-> values[p]]
Promise == [a \in acceptors |-> promises[a]]
Accept == [a \in acceptors |-> accepts[a]]
Chosen == chosen

\* Type invariant
TypeOK == 
  /\ acceptors \subseteq Nat
  /\ proposers \subseteq Nat
  /\ promises \subseteq acceptors \X [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]
  /\ accepts \subseteq acceptors \X [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]
  /\ chosen \subseteq Nat
  /\ ballots \subseteq proposers \X Nat
  /\ values \subseteq proposers \X Nat

\* Initial state
Init == 
  /\ acceptors \subseteq Nat
  /\ proposers \subseteq Nat
  /\ promises = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]]
  /\ accepts = [a \in acceptors |-> [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]]
  /\ chosen = {}
  /\ ballots = [p \in proposers |-> 0]
  /\ values = [p \in proposers |-> 0]

\* Next-state relation
Next == 
  \/ \E a \in acceptors:
       /\ promises' = [promises EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]]
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ ballots' = ballots
       /\ values' = values
  \/ \E a \in acceptors:
       /\ accepts' = [accepts EXCEPT ![a] = [ballot \in Nat, value \in Nat]]
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ ballots' = ballots
       /\ values' = values
  \/ \E p \in proposers:
       /\ values' = [values EXCEPT ![p] = [v \in Nat]]
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ ballots' = ballots
  \/ \E p \in proposers:
       /\ ballots' = [ballots EXCEPT ![p] = [b \in Nat]]
       /\ promises' = promises
       /\ accepts' = accepts
       /\ chosen' = chosen
       /\ values' = values

\* Specification
Spec == Init /\ [][Next]_<<acceptors, proposers, promises, accepts, chosen, ballots, values>>

name: Bounded Retransmission Protocol
generated_spec:
---- MODULE FileTransfer ----
EXTENDS Integers, Sequences, FiniteSets

CONSTANTS MAX_RETRIES, CHUNK_SIZE, FILE_SIZE, CHUNK_COUNT
VARIABLES ackedChunks, channel, chunks, file, retransmitCount, sentChunks, timeout

    /\ file \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ Len(file) = FILE_SIZE
    /\ chunks \in Seq(1..255)
    /\ Len(chunks) = CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ sentChunks \in SUBSET 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ retransmitCount \in Nat
    /\ ackedChunks \in SUBSET 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ channel \in SUBSET 1..CHUNK_COUNT
    /\ timeout \in BOOLEAN

Init ==
    /\ file = [i \in 1..FILE_SIZE |-> i] \* Example file content
    /\ chunks = [i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT |-> [j \in 1..CHUNK_SIZE |-> (i-1)*CHUNK_SIZE + j]] \* Divide file into chunks
    /\ sentChunks = {} \* No chunks sent initially
    /\ retransmitCount = 0 \* No retransmissions yet
    /\ ackedChunks = {} \* No acknowledgments yet
    /\ channel = {} \* No chunks in the channel initially
    /\ timeout = FALSE \* No timeout initially

SendChunk ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT : i \notin sentChunks
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks \cup {i}
    /\ channel' = channel \cup {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ timeout' = FALSE

ReceiveAck ==
    /\ \E i \in 1..CHUNK_COUNT : i \in channel
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks \cup {i}
    /\ channel' = channel \setminus {i}
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount
    /\ timeout' = FALSE

Timeout ==
    /\ timeout = FALSE
    /\ channel' = channel
    /\ retransmitCount' = retransmitCount + 1
    /\ sentChunks' = sentChunks
    /\ ackedChunks' = ackedChunks
    /\ timeout' = TRUE

Next ==
    \/ SendChunk
    \/ ReceiveAck
    \/ Timeout

Spec ==
    Init /\ [][Next]_<<file, chunks, sentChunks, retransmitCount, ackedChunks, channel, timeout>>
